text: Here's what science actually says about intermittent fasting evidence. Intermittent fasting is more than just a trend; it’s backed by research. Studies suggest it can boost metabolism and improve health markers. But not all findings are conclusive. Some results are still preliminary. So, while intermittent fasting shows promise, more research is needed. Curious about trying it? Research and consult a pro before diving in.
